name: Together AI

dataResidency.euRegionDetails: No dedicated EU region for serverless inference. All infrastructure is US-based.

dataUsage.retentionPolicy: No training without explicit opt-in. Zero Data Retention mode available via Settings > Profile.

notes: Delaware corp, headquartered in San Francisco, CA. SCCs referenced for EEA/UK transfers. No EU infrastructure. ZDR mode available. Sub-processor list not publicly disclosed.
